cards.subject: Real builders vs script goblins
cards.caption: The loudest GitHub accounts this week are single-repo push loops, not builders. Rank by merged PRs across repos instead and a different cohort surfaces.

visual.note: excluded 12 [bot] accounts + 3 single-repo mega-pushers flagged as scripted

topComment.author: grey-area
topComment.body: Push count is a vanity metric — merged PRs across repos is the only signal that tracks real maintenance.

query.sql:
SELECT actor_login, count() AS events_7d, countIf(event_type='PushEvent') AS pushes_7d, sum(commit_count) AS commits_7d, uniqExact(repo_name) AS repos_7d, countIf(event_type='PullRequestEvent') AS prs_7d, sum(pr_merged) AS merged_prs_7d
FROM github_events
WHERE created_at >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
  AND position(actor_login, '[bot]') = 0 AND position(lower(actor_login), 'bot') = 0
GROUP BY actor_login
HAVING pushes_7d > 0
ORDER BY pushes_7d DESC
LIMIT 1000

cards.subject: Qwen
cards.caption: Qwen is dominating HN attention with intense discussion but little matching code today. Reads as hot takes, not mature tooling yet.

query.sql:
SELECT toStartOfDay(hour) AS day, sum(talk_threads) AS talk, sum(code_score) AS code
FROM daily_skinny_subject_hourly
WHERE subject = 'Qwen' AND hour >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day

cards.subject: bojieli/ai-agent-book
cards.caption: AI-agent guide repo broke out with 11 stars in 24h, 10.6x its 30-day baseline. Early interest, small absolute base — watch for follow-through.

query.sql:
SELECT day, sum(stars) AS stars
FROM gh_repo_daily
WHERE repo_name = 'bojieli/ai-agent-book' AND day >= today() - 7
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day
